comment: Positive allowlist of link-preview crawler UA substrings for custom meta-tags serving. tokens = case-insensitive, tokens_cs = case-sensitive. Canonical copy: data/preview_bots.json; edge copy edge/spoo-edge-cache/contract/preview_bots.json must be byte-identical (pinned by tests on both sides). Sources: official platform docs + source code + monperrus/crawler-user-agents, matomo bots.yml, arcjet/well-known-bots, CF Radar directory (audit 2026-07-09). NEVER add in-app-browser tokens (Line/, KAKAOTALK, bare Viber/Snapchat/Pinterest) — they match real humans. Search/AI crawlers (Applebot, BingPreview, Linespider, meta-externalagent/-fetcher/-webindexer, Bytespider...) are deliberately absent: they must keep getting the 302. cf_categories = verifiedBotCategory values observed on the real zone (filled by recon before enforcement).
